acceptanceCriteria: perAcceptedChange.elapsedMs is denominated by accepted changes and is null unless elapsed data is complete for every accepted change, with present/missing counts retained

Evidence artifacts are validated strictly per artifact; malformed outcomes, attempts, and routing plans are counted as malformed instead of aggregated with defaulted fields, and malformed-field fixtures cover this

Configured-relative-cost totals and per-accepted-change values are null or explicitly partial whenever any contributing attempt's routing plan is unresolved; known and unknown numerators are separated
Calibration proposals bind evidence to manifest/split provenance and reject holdout task IDs for calibration-fitting proposals
Replay marks a task changed when any part of the selection differs (status, candidate ID, capability class, or configured relative cost), with same-candidate mutation tests
The evaluation-report JSON schema fully specifies report fields with additionalProperties false and negative schema tests
Evidence reads resolve and validate containment of the evidence root and per-task paths before reading, refusing symlink escape while still supporting an explicitly selected fixture root
Candidate aggregation uses a composite identity (provider/model/capability class) so distinct candidates never collapse
A distinct rigor.calibration-proposal-input.v1 schema describes the CLI input; the checked-in fixture validates against it and the saved artifact validates against rigor.calibration-proposal.v1
All existing tests and checks still pass: npm run test:all, npm run bench, claude plugin validate . --strict, git diff --check
The sample report is still produced entirely from checked-in synthetic fixtures
constraints: Remediate exactly the nine recorded independent-review findings (consultation_456a5541-d37f-4a57-859f-336e26a039ec under GH-16-R2); no unrelated changes
Do not delete, weaken, or skip existing tests or configured checks
Existing artifact schemas and consumers outside this change remain accepted unchanged
Configured relative cost remains an abstract comparison weight; never a price, token count, or provider charge
Unknown data stays unknown/null; never inferred
Proposals remain inert: no code path applies them to routing, thresholds, or profiles
Fixtures stay synthetic, secret-free, without absolute paths
Stop if remediation requires paths outside the allowed list or weakening a security boundary
stopConditions: a required check fails twice without a new hypothesis
